stories.title: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
stories.body: The Nobel Peace Prize laureate has been in detention since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.

stories.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
stories.body: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.

stories.title: US House votes to end government shutdown over immigration operations
stories.body: The vote provides funding for most Department of Homeland Security agencies, except for two subagencies responsible for immigration enforcement.

stories.title: Deadly Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon despite ceasefire
stories.body: At least nine people - including two children - were killed, according to Lebanon's health ministry.

stories.title: Trump says US studying troop cuts in Germany, as spat with Merz intensifies
stories.body: His remarks come after the German chancellor criticised the US approach to the war in Iran.

stories.title: Belgium plans to nationalise nuclear power plants
stories.body: Prime Minister Bart De Wever said the move would see "less dependence on fossil fuel imports and more control over our own supply".

stories.title: Britney Spears charged in California with driving under influence
stories.body: The pop star's representatives have called the incident "completely inexcusable" and she has since checked herself into rehab.

stories.title: Israel intercepts Gaza flotilla near Crete and detains 175 activists
stories.body: Pro-Palestinian activists say 22 boats carrying aid for Gaza were illegally intercepted in international waters near the Greek island.

stories.title: Man sentenced to death for murder of toddlers at Ugandan nursery
stories.body: Christopher Okello Onyum had pleaded insanity but this was dismissed by the judge.

stories.title: 'How are we going to get back home?' Islamist group tightens blockade on Mali capital
stories.body: The blockade comes days after Mali's defence minister was assassinated in a series of nationwide attacks.

stories.title: US charges Mexican governor and other leaders with aiding drug cartel
stories.body: The governor of Sinaloa, Rubén Rocha Moya, hails from the same party as the president of Mexico.

stories.title: China to ban drone sales in Beijing citing security concerns
stories.body: Drone users will also be required to register their devices and secure permits before flying them.

stories.title: Police say they believe abducted child was murdered as body found in Outback
stories.body: The five-year-old girl was last seen on Saturday at an Aboriginal town camp near Alice Springs.

stories.title: US singer D4vd bought tools online to dispose of girl's body, prosecutors allege
stories.body: The Tiktok star's attorneys have maintained his innocence and vowed to "vigorously defend" him.

stories.title: Christchurch mass killer loses bid to overturn conviction
stories.body: White supremacist Brenton Tarrant's appeal is "utterly devoid of merit", a New Zealand court has ruled.

stories.title: Trainee driver crashes bus into River Seine
stories.body: The driver hit a parked car and veered off the road into the river - about 12 miles south of Paris - early on Thursday.

stories.title: Jewish agency warned of 'high' threat level ahead of Bondi shooting, report finds
stories.body: Gun reforms should be prioritised and policing around Jewish events increased, royal commission says.

stories.title: 'I did not expect it': Kenya's Sabastian Sawe welcomed home with jubilant celebrations
stories.body: The first man to run a marathon in under two hours in a competitive race received a hero's welcome from supporters and family when he arrived home.

stories.title: King and Queen lay flowers at 9/11 Memorial in New York
stories.body: King Charles and Queen Camilla on their state visit to the US visit the memorial in New York.

stories.title: Comey surrenders over charge of threatening Trump's life in Instagram post
stories.body: Prosecutors say a 2025 seashell photo posted by the former FBI director was a call for violence against Trump.
